content: Finish Ramona's side story then use the item from there + 60 normal pulls/cores.

level compensation was exclusive to the actual event run

i would recommend just borrowing a whale pollux support

But yeah that explains it. They might wanna write somewhere, that this is only active during the event, just to prevent poor souls like me from wasting 2 hours trying to figure out if lv scaling is not active or if they just suck at team-building xD

Yeah that would be the easy way. But meh.. I might pick up a lv. 80 or so lotan, which isn't min-maxed, and see how that goes, and if that doesn't work, I'll tackle this mode later (assuming I can find one - lotan as a support unit seems to be quite rare)
I'm not a fan of cheesing myself through content with borrowed whale units

embeds.title: Niko's Event Unlock Recommendations
embeds.description: Since the in-game side story list is not in chronological order, this is a spoiler-free list of side stories I recommend to those interested in the lore of Morimens to read and in what order.  This list is also a spoiler-free companion list to my (spoiler full) Morimens timeline project, where I ...

content: Thanks
Should I reroll?
ok so does this mean i should start pulling on the standard wheel banner or swapping to a different realm?
wheel for titan blade

90% of the teams benefit from running Thais
The other ten are not in and cannot splash for Caro
Rerolling is kind of useless in this game. The game hands standard pulls out like crazy, so assuming you haven't used any luminious cores having murphy (a season 1 limited) is pretty good.
How is thais so essential?
It is pointless to reroll in this game
It is screw it and we ball

Before I explain lemme first ask if you’re an experienced card game player or not.
It will help I promise
I am decent with that let say I had experience from the other card gacha game
YouSavedMorimens for 100 free standard pulls
Thais can apply vul/weakness, generates a ton of the caro resource that generate embyros, duplicates cards and reduces their cost, and is a small strength generator.
She's REALLY good at a lot of things. On top of that her wheel is one of the best in the game.

Ok in that case +2 cards at -2 cost
Along with the best aliemus generation in the game
Consistent vulnerable and weakness
And being Caro
She’s by far the best support in the game

Hi In Shock

For about 2 years this game was on the verge of EOS
During the time of the first anniversary it was basically “yeah if we don’t get new investors we are just shutting down”
Through the combined efforts of the community and developers they’ve now secured enough funding for multiple years of development (or so they claim)
This is their thank you

You're garenteed one at least with 90 pulls. It's called wheel jail for a reason though. I'm starting to get comfortable with the idea of leaving wheel jail and I have two wheels at +12, and one at +10. Once I get that last wheel to +12 I'm going to start rolling more standard characters.

The odds are the exactly the same. But honestly you can do what you want but getting a wheel to +12 is a huge power increase.

Yup, already did before lol
Dupes still nice
The first copy lets you use a wheel. The second, third, and fourth copy increase the wheel's primary effect. Everything after that increase the stat associated with the wheel.
When I was still in early wheel jail I got 4 copies of all of the "good" standard wheels just to have the "best" version of the wheel early on. Then afterwards I went for my second +12 wheel.
